channel.title: Frankasaurus' Obsidian Repo
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Frankasaurus' Obsidian Repo

item.title: Carmine Char
item.description: Note Carmine Charr § Base Info § TypePlayer CharacterPlayerKacper Character Information § NameJules Carmine Charr Jr.AliassesThe 20th Chosen of Olvex (title bestowed by Olvex)GenderMaleCreature TypeHumanoidRaceGenasi (Fire)ClassCleric (Light Domain)BornDragoness Barony , 28 years agoLanguagesCommon, PrimordialFamily- Sabine Charr (sister) - Jules Charr Sr.

item.title: Elisabeth de Dragoness
item.description: Note Elisabeth de Dragoness § Base Info § TypePlayer CharacterPlayerKim Character Information § NameElisabeth de DragonessAliasesHis Free Lady (official title in Dragoness Barony)GenderFemaleCreature TypeHumanoidRaceTieflingClassSorcerer (Draconic Bloodline)BornDragoness Barony , 23 years agoLanguagesCommon, Infernal, DraconicFamily- Xavion de Dragoness (father, Baron de Dragoness)- Willemijn de Dragoness (Mother)- Amenadiel de Dragoness, Benjamin de Dragoness, Charles de Dragoness, Diederick de Dragoness (brothers)Connections- Party (Member)- The Bonehead (Quartermaster)StatusAliveSessionsAll Sessions Stats § Level6HP??AC15Str8Int10Dex14Wis12Con12Cha19 Elisabeth de Dragoness is a Tiefling Draconic Bloodline Sorcerer.

item.title: Phillipa Vurrinir
item.description: Note Phillipa Vurrinir § Base Info § TypePlayer CharacterPlayerHanne Character Information § NamePhillipa VurrinirAliasesMistholdGenderFemaleCreature TypeHumanoidRaceElf (Wood)ClassRogue (thief)BornUnknown , 236 years agoLanguagesCommon, Elvish, Thieves’ CantFamily-Connections- Party (member)StatusAliveSessionsFrom Session 29 onwards Stats § Level7HP59AC14Str12Int11Dex18Wis16Con15Cha9 Phillipa Vurrinir is a Wood Elf Thief Rogue.

item.title: Robyn
item.description: Note Robyn § Base Info § TypePlayer CharacterPlayerLise Character Information § NameRobynGenderFemaleCreature TypeHumanoidRaceHalf-OrcClassMonk, Way of the Astral SelfBornTorpe , 24 years agoLanguagesCommon, OrcishFamily- Rhayn (mother)- Linzo (father)Connections- Party (member)- Mozelin Brown’s Bazaar (member)StatusAliveSessionsFrom Session 9 onwards Stats § Level=this.

item.title: Roderick
item.description: Note Roderick § Base Info § TypePlayer CharacterPlayerMelle Character Information § NameRoderickGenderMaleCreature TypeHumanoidRaceHalf-Elf (Wood)ClassWarlock (Pact of the Fiend)BornThe Wovens , 20 years agoLanguagesCommon, ElvishFamily- Unnamed father and motherConnections- Party (member)- The Bonehead (First Mate)StatusAliveSessionsAll Sessions Stats § Level7HP??AC12Str8Int9Dex10Wis14Con14Cha18 Roderick is a Half-Elf of Wood-Elf herritage, and a Pact of the Fiend Warlock.

item.title: Vimak Vaimei-Laga
item.description: Note Vimak Vaimei-Laga § Base Info § TypePlayer CharacterPlayerRoy Character Information § NameVimak Vaimei-LagaAliases- “Lonehunter” (Clan name)- Ysmir Hardrada (borrowed name)GenderMaleCreature TypeHumanoidRaceGoliathClassPaladin (Oath of Devotion)BornDevostina Alps, 30 years agoLanguagesCommon, Giant, ElvishFamily- Kuori “Bearkiller” (father)- Lo-Kag “Wordpainter” (mother)- Aukan “Keepeye” (brother, deceased)Connections- Party (member)- The Bonehead (Captain)- Gathakeaku Clan (ex-member, banished)- Hevenar (Oath patron)StatusAliveSessionsAll Sessions Stats § Level7HP63AC18Str13Int15Dex11Wis11Con14Cha12 Vimak Vaimei-Laga is a Goliath Oath of Devotion Paladin.

item.title: Dragoness Family
item.description: Note Dragoness Family § Base Info § TypeNoble houseNameHouse DragonessLocationGeros region, GreyskilConnections- Gabong (Trading partners) House Dragoness are a family based in Dragoness Barony on the East coast of Greyskil.

item.title: Greyskil Refugee Resistance
item.description: Note Greyskil Refugee Resistance § Base Info § TypeMilitiaNameGreyskil Refugee Resistance (GRR)LocationGeros region, GreyskilConnections- Elin Prosperity Sphere (Main enemies)- Dragoness Family (Secondary enemies)- Cirdorim (Ally) The Greyskill Refugee Resistance (GRR) is an organisation and militia consisting of citizens mainly of the citizens of Geros Region’s cities, such as in Gabong, but also from Dragoness Barony, specifically in the repressed, isolated, and poverty-stricken Order Quadrant.

item.title: Mozelin Brown's Bazaar
item.description: Note Mozelin Brown’s Bazaar § Base Info § TypeTraveling CircusNameMadame Mozelin Brown’s BazaarLocationAround Bloeming IslesConnections- Robyn (ex-employee) Mozelin Brown’s Bazaar is a traveling circus run by Madame Mozelin Brown, hosting a maner of acts performed by individuals from all over Califhen.

item.title: Party
item.description: Note Party § Base Info § TypeAdventuring PartyNameNameless as of yetLocationOriginally from Bloeming Isles. Currently traveling throughout GreyskilConnections- Dragoness Family (Relation)- The Bonehead (Crew)-- Wilmide Ostver (Ally) The Party is an (as of yet nameless) adventuring party, originating from the harbor of Telack.
